args.description: dark glossy oil slick puddle with faint iridescent sheen, irregular edges, seen from directly above, top-down view

elongated ridge of piled desert sand seen from directly overhead in strict bird's-eye aerial view, a long dune mound with wind ripple lines across it, highlight along the crest and shadow along one edge, flat map view with no horizon and no perspective
wooden camel pen enclosure with rough fence posts and a gate, on sand, seen from directly above, top-down view
frameDescriptions: gate closed, fence fully enclosing the pen
gate swung open leaving a clear exit gap in the fence

args.description: rooftop of a souq market stall seen from directly overhead in strict bird's-eye map view, only the rectangular red and white striped fabric awning roof is visible from above, no sides visible, no perspective, flat aerial view like a building rooftop on a game map
args.action: being smashed flat by a truck, viewed from directly above
frameDescriptions: intact rectangular striped awning roof seen flat from above
the striped awning torn open in the middle, splintered wooden frame poking through, seen flat from above
flattened wreckage seen flat from above: scattered planks, torn striped cloth pieces and spilled pots strewn on the ground

args.description: wooden cargo crate bound with rope, nearly identical to a real cargo crate but with slightly loose rope and one darker plank, seen from directly above, top-down view
